title: cyperus gunnii var. gunnii
intro: Cyperus gunnii var. gunnii, also known as Australian Sawgrass, is a perennial sedge native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus gunnii var. gunnii include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
